title: CoralMC BedWars Icons
description: Give a nice look to GUIs on the biggest Italian server's BedWars
body:
This Pack aims to give Icons on some of the CoralMC BedWars GUIs elements, for example the shop has some icons on categories and even on upgrade shop, you can find icons even on lobby and waiting lobby

please consider that not everything has an icon, in particular things rappresented by blocks

[SHOWCASE ON GALLERY](https://modrinth.com/project/coralmc-bedwars-icons/gallery)

### **[OPTIFINE](https://www.optifine.net/) OR ANY MOD SUPPORTING CIT IS REQUIRED, OR NOTHING WILL WORK**

if you are wondering if this Pack works on other servers, the answer is no and at the moment i'm not going to implement such thing

### **I'M NOT AFFILIATED WITH CORALMC**
